description: Latest data must still be analyzed but could help determine if dark energy is constant or varies over time.

title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
description: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

description: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

description: For decades, scientists have concentrated on what now looks to be a blind alley.

title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
description: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
description: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express,  Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.

description: The company uses AI to review code that, more often than not these days, has also been generated by AI.

description: Parasail raised $32 million in a Series A, signaling a fractured future of models and compute.

title: The Download: NASA’s nuclear spacecraft and unveiling our AI 10

title: Cyberscammers are bypassing banks’ security with illicit tools sold on Telegram
description: From inside a money-laundering center in Cambodia, an employee opens a popular Vietnamese banking app on his phone. title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
description: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

title: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Much Worse Than You Thought
description: An analysis by WIRED and Indicator found nearly 90 schools and 600 students around the world impacted by AI-generated deepfake nude images—and the problem shows no signs of going away.

title: No one’s sure if synthetic mirror life will kill us all

title: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
description: The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship. title: Redefining the future of software engineering
description: Software engineering has experienced two seismic shifts this century. title: How to Use Google Chrome’s New AI-Powered ‘Skills’
description: The premade Skills available through the Gemini sidebar in Chrome include ways to maximize protein in recipes or summarize YouTube videos.

title: Anthropic Opposes the Extreme AI Liability Bill That OpenAI Backed
description: Anthropic and OpenAI are clashing over a proposed Illinois law that would let AI labs largely off the hook for mass deaths and financial disasters.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
